typography.instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use default system fonts for headings. Implement global font via next/font or standard CDN. Ensure extreme weight contrast between headings and body.

colors.instructions_to_main_agent: Use Archetype 4 (Swiss/High Contrast) mixed with Tactical Utility. Dominant UI is monochrome white/grey/black. Use primary color (High-Vis Orange, #EA580C) strictly for the prominent action (Share Location). Ensure dark overlays for hero images never exceed bg-black/50.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Use flat surfaces with sharp 1px borders border-black/10. Avoid heavy soft shadows. Add a subtle shadow-sm for elevation on cards.
visual_enhancers.effects: Avoid glassmorphism except on sticky admin navbars. Keep UI opaque for maximum glare-free readability outdoors.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use border-slate-200 for structured grids. Admin table layout should utilize border-collapse with subtle right/bottom borders for high density data visualization.

components.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Label. Apply border border-input rounded-md w-full. Avoid native HTML <input>.

buttons.primary: rounded-md border-2 border-black w-full py-6 text-lg font-black uppercase tracking-wide bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-transform duration-200. Neuomorphic subtle variant is banned. Use solid hard borders for this tactical field app.

components.modalsDialogs: Use Shadcn Dialog for Privacy Policy. Overlay bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm. Deep contrast text.
components.map: Leaflet + OpenStreetMap integration via react-leaflet. Use high-contrast presentation if possible, otherwise default OSM. Ensure sticky positioning on desktop split layout.
components.instructions: Strip Shadcn components of default shadow-sm if it feels too soft; lean into stark 1px solid borders for a more durable 'contractor tool' vibe. DO NOT use HTML-based components for advanced user interactions.

grids_layouts.mobile_public: Mobile-first centered column, generous p-4 to p-6 padding. Single clear hierarchy (Job Details -> Form -> Large Location Button -> Mini Map status).
grids_layouts.desktop_public: Split screen. Left: 40vw form and details. Right: 60vw fixed Map showing default area.
grids_layouts.admin_dashboard: High Density Protocol. grid-cols-12 layout. Top nav overlapping standard. Dense tabular layout for check-in data. max 8px border-radius.
grids_layouts.spacing_scale: Use standard Tailwind but apply at macro-scale between sections (gap-8, py-12). Internally on cards use p-6 for breathing room.

motion.transitions: transition-colors duration-200 for links. hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform for cards/buttons.
motion.loaders: Spinners on the 'Share Location' button while fetching GPS coordinates. Prevent double-click.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast. Especially for the white text on primary orange buttons.
accessibility.touch_targets: The main 'Share Location' button MUST be at least 60px height. Fat-finger optimized.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

hero_background.description: Two construction workers on site under a cloudy sky. Use as an optional low-opacity background for the public login/check-in page, wrapped in a div with bg-black/40.

company_logo.description: Professional logo placeholder for the admin dashboard header and public form header.

media.instructions: Use full absolute paths for images. The hero background should NOT drown out the form. Use solid backgrounds for data density areas.

instructions_to_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Do not use dark colors as gradients.
Do not center align the app container, avoid '.App { text-align: center; }'.
Use sonner for toast notifications on check-in success/failure.
Create new components using pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts, and use Shadcn for interactive logic.
Add 'data-testid' to all critical interactions (form submit, map marker, privacy consent check).
Admin tables must handle high density data (Name, Email, Coordinates, Timestamp, Job ID). Use tight padding (py-2 px-3) inside table cells.
Check-in button must prompt for Geolocation API clearly, ensuring the Privacy modal intercepts FIRST before triggering browser prompt.
Ensure the application strictly follows standard JS component export patterns (.js files not .tsx).
Do not use completely transparent backgrounds for overlays or navbars over content.
